chapter_title.en: Chapter on Recognizing the Major Sins for Which Allah {swt}, the Almighty, Has Threatened with Hellfire

text: اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "شَفَاعَتُنَا لِأَهْلِ اَلْكَبَائِرِ مِنْ شِيعَتِنَا وَ أَمَّا اَلتَّائِبُونَ فَإِنَّ اَللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ يَقُولُ: ۝ مٰا عَلَى اَلْمُحْسِنِينَ مِنْ سَبِيلٍ ۝ "

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4964 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Our intercession is for the sinners who commit major sins from among our followers. As for those who repent, Allah (swt), the Mighty and Majestic, says: 'There is no blame upon the doers of good.'" (Surah At-Tawbah 9:91)
